findings.issue: JP surface contains OCR error: '幅輳' should be '輻輳' (fukusō, network congestion). The zh ('网络拥塞') and en ('Congestion') translations correctly self-corrected to the semantic meaning despite the garbled JP source — translation quality is good, but the JP surface form itself is wrong and will fail any JP-language quiz, glossary lookup, or kanji search. Definition body 'ものが1箇所に集まること' is a literal kanji-gloss tied to the radical etymology of 輻輳 ('spokes converging'); it survives translation but is etymological filler rather than a useful technical definition.
findings.recommended_fix: Fix JP surface form: '幅輳' → '輻輳'. ZH '网络拥塞' and EN 'Congestion' are semantically correct and need no change. Optionally trim the trailing etymological sentence in the definition body across all three languages, or replace with a concrete example (e.g. New Year's Eve voice-call surge).

audit_notes: Audited 6 leaves: (1) section '14-02 伝送効率と伝送時間' clean. (2) term '伝送効率' formula preserved precisely across zh/en. (3) term '伝送時間' formula preserved precisely. (4) DEFECT — see findings above; JP OCR error '幅輳' vs correct '輻輳'. (5) term '実効値' — short, accurate. (6) term '理論値' — short, accurate. No choice markers.
